name: River runout AhKd2c-Qc-4d dry
description: River spot on a dry runout. Hero assumed to be in position post-flop and went check-check on flop and turn; river brings a safe 4d. Very narrow ranges (flop-SRP ranges filtered for hands that would check back both previous streets). This is the easiest river to solve — almost pure value-vs-bluff-catch dynamic. Hero = BB (c-bet-caller last to act), villain = BTN.

input.hero_range: AA, KK, QQ, JJ, AKo, AQo

expected_notes: Populated by differential run. Straightforward polar vs bluff-catcher setup; hero's AA/KK/QQ/AKo have showdown value, villain's TT/99/AJ are weak bluff-catchers. Reasonable first river fixture for regression testing.
